## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss growth strategies and operational challenges for Datagrid.ai, focusing on scaling the business rapidly to reach Series B readiness.](https://fathom.video/share/amxTYdNNohncCGhtbsE4a3adbnzSCsWi?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Thiago is facing intense time management challenges due to rapid growth and lack of sales staff](https://fathom.video/share/amxTYdNNohncCGhtbsE4a3adbnzSCsWi?tab=summary&timestamp=427.0)
  - [Datagrid.ai needs to reach $1M ARR quickly (ideally within 90-120 days) to position for Series B funding](https://fathom.video/share/amxTYdNNohncCGhtbsE4a3adbnzSCsWi?tab=summary&timestamp=566.0)
  - [Marcel proposed a multi-pronged growth strategy involving content marketing, outbound sales, and leveraging existing inbound interest](https://fathom.video/share/amxTYdNNohncCGhtbsE4a3adbnzSCsWi?tab=summary&timestamp=633.0)
  - [Both agreed on the need for additional sales and marketing support to capitalize on current product-market fit](https://fathom.video/share/amxTYdNNohncCGhtbsE4a3adbnzSCsWi?tab=summary&timestamp=933.0)

## Topics

### Thiago's Current Challenges

  - [Extremely busy schedule with back-to-back meetings, causing potential burnout](https://fathom.video/share/amxTYdNNohncCGhtbsE4a3adbnzSCsWi?tab=summary&timestamp=427.0)
  - [Lack of sales staff; Thiago handling all sales calls personally](https://fathom.video/share/amxTYdNNohncCGhtbsE4a3adbnzSCsWi?tab=summary&timestamp=67.0)
  - [Need to hire someone to close deals and free up Thiago's time for product work](https://fathom.video/share/amxTYdNNohncCGhtbsE4a3adbnzSCsWi?tab=summary&timestamp=87.0)
  - [Recent loss of key team members (AE to Palantir, another to Retool)](https://fathom.video/share/amxTYdNNohncCGhtbsE4a3adbnzSCsWi?tab=summary&timestamp=372.0)

### Datagrid.ai's Growth and Potential

  - [Currently at $200K ARR from Datagrid alone (separate from Thorik)](https://fathom.video/share/amxTYdNNohncCGhtbsE4a3adbnzSCsWi?tab=summary&timestamp=609.0)
  - [Aiming for $1M ARR within 90-120 days to position for Series B funding](https://fathom.video/share/amxTYdNNohncCGhtbsE4a3adbnzSCsWi?tab=summary&timestamp=566.0)
  - [Seeing significant inbound interest and account creation from diverse industries](https://fathom.video/share/amxTYdNNohncCGhtbsE4a3adbnzSCsWi?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [Product showing strong conversion when users hit usage limits](https://fathom.video/share/amxTYdNNohncCGhtbsE4a3adbnzSCsWi?tab=summary&timestamp=816.0)

### Proposed Growth Strategy

  - [Implement aggressive programmatic outbound using warmed IPs and multiple domains](https://fathom.video/share/amxTYdNNohncCGhtbsE4a3adbnzSCsWi?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
  - [Develop content marketing to support organic growth](https://fathom.video/share/amxTYdNNohncCGhtbsE4a3adbnzSCsWi?tab=summary&timestamp=952.0)
  - [Leverage Marcel's network to move some of his clients to Datagrid](https://fathom.video/share/amxTYdNNohncCGhtbsE4a3adbnzSCsWi?tab=summary&timestamp=935.0)
  - [Set up webinars and other co-marketing initiatives](https://fathom.video/share/amxTYdNNohncCGhtbsE4a3adbnzSCsWi?tab=summary&timestamp=1205.0)
  - [Hire additional technical content creator and leverage Jimmy for growth hacking](https://fathom.video/share/amxTYdNNohncCGhtbsE4a3adbnzSCsWi?tab=summary&timestamp=1252.0)

### Sales Process Optimization

  - [Need to implement a vetting process to qualify leads before they reach Thiago](https://fathom.video/share/amxTYdNNohncCGhtbsE4a3adbnzSCsWi?tab=summary&timestamp=67.0)
  - [Marcel offered to assist with demos, showcasing a 25-minute closing process](https://fathom.video/share/amxTYdNNohncCGhtbsE4a3adbnzSCsWi?tab=summary&timestamp=1205.0)
  - [Discuss coordinating with Datagrid's SDR for efficient lead handling](https://fathom.video/share/amxTYdNNohncCGhtbsE4a3adbnzSCsWi?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)

### Hiring and Team Structure

  - [Marcel shared his streamlined hiring process using no-code tools and workflows](https://fathom.video/share/amxTYdNNohncCGhtbsE4a3adbnzSCsWi?tab=summary&timestamp=119.0)
  - [Thiago considering hiring more support staff, including a technical content creator](https://fathom.video/share/amxTYdNNohncCGhtbsE4a3adbnzSCsWi?tab=summary&timestamp=1252.0)
  - [Discussed potential engagement structure with Marcel's team, including retainer and performance bonuses](https://fathom.video/share/amxTYdNNohncCGhtbsE4a3adbnzSCsWi?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to draft and send a detailed proposal by end of day](https://fathom.video/share/amxTYdNNohncCGhtbsE4a3adbnzSCsWi?tab=summary&timestamp=1344.0)
  - [Schedule follow-up call with Kyle and Jimmy to discuss implementation](https://fathom.video/share/amxTYdNNohncCGhtbsE4a3adbnzSCsWi?tab=summary&timestamp=935.0)
  - [Finalize engagement structure and start date (potentially Monday)](https://fathom.video/share/amxTYdNNohncCGhtbsE4a3adbnzSCsWi?tab=summary&timestamp=1354.0)
  - [Thiago to consider hiring additional support staff, particularly for sales and content creation](https://fathom.video/share/amxTYdNNohncCGhtbsE4a3adbnzSCsWi?tab=summary&timestamp=1252.0)
  - [Implement lead qualification process to optimize Thiago's time in sales calls](https://fathom.video/share/amxTYdNNohncCGhtbsE4a3adbnzSCsWi?tab=summary&timestamp=67.0)
